Scofflaw Brewing |
Continue to the main page content
Good beer. That’s it.
Born and raised in Atlanta, Scofflaw has always stood for going your own way and making your own rules. Hell, our story starts in a literal basement. Talk about a come up. And these days, we’re still focused on bringing the best beer to the surface to fuel your good times.

The Original
Our original taproom located on the westside of Atlanta. Home of our main production brewery and the original heart of Scofflaw. Family friendly neighborhood vibe showcasing live sports, special events, and great beer!
Visit Us
Location
1738 MacArthur Blvd NW
Atlanta, GA 30318

What's On Tap
Scofflaw Draft Beer
F#$@ Cancer
5.9%
IPA - American
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
First brewed at Dr. Scofflaw's, this IPA honors our late partner, Scott Selig's, tenacious spirit with its bold hop expression. Scott's ingenuity created The Works and his memory inspires us to keep fighting the good fight. Proceeds support Blood Cancer United. This time we made a Hazy IPA with Citra, Azacca Hops, Citra Dynaboost in the Whirlpool, and dry hopped again with Citra and Azacca.
Basement IPA
6.5%
IPA - American
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
The first IPA from our original basement brewery. This one’s made for people who like to do things their own way – just like us. It’s Dank, Juicy, and stacked to the brim with Citra hops.
Double Basement
8.5%
IPA - Imperial / Double
Scofflaw Brewing Co.
Learn more
Don’t double down, double up! Our original Basement IPA may be stacked with Citra hops, but when you’re ready for the next level, choose Double Basement. More Dank. More Juicy. More More.
POG Basement
6.5%
IPA - Fruited
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
Take a vacation from the Basement. Set that out-of-office reply (or don’t) and escape to a breezy tropical IPA paradise where Passionfruit, Orange and Guava Flow.
POGZILLA
9.0%
IPA - Imperial / Double
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
Brewed with Tropical Fruit and enough hops to level a city skyline!  Watch out this Double IPA is 9%!  Be on the lookout for the monstrous beer near you!  Go Go POGzilla!
Tropical Staycation
5.7%
Sour - Fruited
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
Teleport to a rejuvenating holiday with juicy pineapple, strawberry, and mango coasting on a refreshingly tart base. It’s the perfect drink for your staycation no matter where you end up.
Double Jeopardy
10.0%
IPA - Imperial / Double
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
Case closed. You found the perfect Double IPA. Intensely cirtrusy with a zingy aroma and bittersweet boozy tingle. The only offense here is not trying it twice.
Scofflaw IPL
8.1%
Lager - IPL (India Pale Lager)
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
The IPL was brewed with Pale 2-row and a small touch of Crystal malt for color and body. The IPL is hopped with Hallert

On Tap & To Go
Location & Hours
Host an Event
Welcome to the Laboratory
Our first R&D brewery located at The Works Development in West Midtown Atlanta. This location is known for 76 taps of our favorites and newly developed beers, an awesome outdoor patio, and access to lots of additional outdoor space throughout the property. You can take our delicious beers throughout The Works into The Camp greenspace, over to the Chattahoochee Food Works food hall with 30 different food stalls to choose from, or wherever else you want to go on the property!
Visit Us
Location
214 Chattahoochee Row NW
Atlanta, GA 30318
Get Directions
1 (404) 254-3846

What's On Tap
Scofflaw Favorites
F#$@ Cancer
5.9%
IPA - American
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
First brewed at Dr. Scofflaw's, this IPA honors our late partner, Scott Selig's, tenacious spirit with its bold hop expression. Scott's ingenuity created The Works and his memory inspires us to keep fighting the good fight. Proceeds support the Leukemia & Lymphoma Society. This time we made an IPA with Tropical and Citrus notes form Citra, Calypso, and Sabro hops
Basement IPA
6.5%
IPA - American
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
The first IPA from our original basement brewery. This one’s made for people who like to do things their own way – just like us. It’s Dank, Juicy, and stacked to the brim with Citra hops.
Juice Quest
6.0%
IPA - New England / Hazy
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
Your quest is over, weary traveler. The Juice is here and filled with our favorite Citra and Mosaic Hops then lavishly Dry Hopped with Azacca for a Tropical zing. Your courage will be rewarded with this hazy treasure, a hoard of lush tropical gems and sparkling golden citrus. But don’t rest for long—the next adventure lurks beyond that door and only you can face it. Ready to play again?
Nice Lager
4.2%
Lager - American
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
Nice Beer?  We think so!  Beer from when beer was beer and for when beer should be just beer.
The right choice, the choicest choice.  Some have even said it's too damn Nice.  We say there's no such thing!
POG Basement
6.5%
IPA - Fruited
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
Take a vacation from the Basement. Set that out-of-office reply (or don’t) and escape to a breezy tropical IPA paradise where Passionfruit, Orange and Guava Flow.
Quest Coast IPA
7.0%
IPA - American
Scofflaw Brewing Company
Learn more
